title: Bitcoin falls below $70K as Federal Reserve signals fewer rate cuts and inflation concerns rise
Crypto markets decline after Fed holds rates steady, reinforcing risk-off sentiment across assets
Bitcoin volatility increases as oil prices surge, raising inflation expectations and pressuring risk assets
US regulators move toward classifying major cryptocurrencies as commodities, offering partial clarity to markets
Bitcoin ETFs record renewed inflows as institutional investors buy recent dip
Citigroup lowers Bitcoin and Ethereum outlook citing regulatory delays and macro uncertainty
